title: Plug Power Q1 2026 Earnings: Turnaround Signals Emerge
text: Plug Power (PLUG) released Q1 2026 results demonstrating meaningful operational progress. The hydrogen fuel cell company reported significant revenue growth and sharp gross margin improvement. Management has shifted from vague long-term targets to specific near-term checkpoints. The company targets positive EBITDA by Q4 2026 and highlighted gains from its Project Quantum Leap cost reduction initiative. The stock trades at $3.96, approximately 18% above analyst targets of $3.37, though Simply Wall St values shares at 35.5% below fair value. Recent momentum has been strong, with the stock gaining 43% over the past month. Despite positive signals, challenges persist. The analysis notes that short cash runway, ongoing losses and recent shareholder dilution remain material concerns requiring investor attention. Investors should monitor quarterly gross margin trends and whether the company achieves its Q4 2026 EBITDA target—concrete measures to evaluate if the turnaround gains genuine traction or stalls.
